name: pi-aftc-toolset
description: AFTC productivity toolset for pi — footer widget with usage costs, cache analysis, turns, context window time, diagnostics etc. Additional input shortcuts, SSH via a Python GUI (PyQt6 GUI) isolating ssh credentials from pi and any AI model, a collection of useful skills (designed to keep context usage low), 3 themes, and more...
author: Darcey Lloyd
